
### exercise (pt 1)  {.smaller}



* use 1-bit predictor on this loop 

   * executed in outer loop (not shown) many, many times

* what is the conditional jump misprediction rate for `i % 3 == 0`?
 
```
int i = 0;
while (true) {
  if (i % 3 == 0)
    goto next; 
  ...
next:
  i += 1;
  if (i == 50)
    break; 
}

```
 ![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt1.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt1.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt1.figure-3.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt1.figure-4.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


### againframe(1BmispredExPt1)

### exercise (pt 2)  {.smaller}



* use 1-bit predictor on this loop 

   * executed in outer loop (not shown) many, many times

* what is the conditional jump misprediction rate for `i == 50`?
 
```
int i = 0;
while (true) {
  if (i % 3 == 0)
    goto next; 
  ...
next:
  i += 1;
  if (i == 50)
    break; 
}

```
 ![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt2.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt2.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExPt2.figure-3.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


### exercise (full)  {.smaller}



* use 1-bit predictor on this loop 

   * executed in outer loop (not shown) many, many times

* what is the conditional jump misprediction rate?
 
```
int i = 0;
while (true) {
  if (i % 3 == 0)
    goto next; 
  ...
next:
  i += 1;
  if (i == 50)
    break; 
}

```
 ![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredEx.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredEx.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredEx.figure-3.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


### exercise soln (1) 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/bpred/texfig/1BmispredExSoln.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::


### againframe(1BmispredExSoln)
